summoner.name: summoner
summoner.goal: farm Key of Hate from The Summoner in Arcane Sanctuary
summoner.description: Reusable farming profile for Act 2 Arcane Sanctuary runs that prioritize reaching and killing The Summoner, then handing loot through the shared fixed-item rules plus any run-specific additions.

hunting.objective: navigate to Arcane Sanctuary through the waypoint, find The Summoner, kill nearby threats only when needed, and finish the run after the boss and approved loot are handled
route_notes: Use the Act 2 waypoint menu and travel directly to Arcane Sanctuary.
Treat the four Arcane Sanctuary wings as the search space for locating The Summoner.
Ignore optional packs unless they block the path or create a survival risk.
Once The Summoner dies, switch priority from pathing/combat to approved loot pickup and safe exit.
End the run if the target area or boss location cannot be confirmed safely within the timeout.

run_specific_rules: Only this profile should contain Arcane Sanctuary and Summoner assumptions; hunting and loot engines stay reusable.
The run counts as successful only when The Summoner is killed and a Key of Hate pickup decision is made.
If a Key of Hate label is detected, keep it even if the inventory is near the minimum free-slot threshold.
Do not continue clearing the sanctuary after the target and approved loot are resolved.
